title: ceanothus integerrimus var. californicus
intro: Ceanothus integerrimus var. californicus, also known as California Mountain Whitebark or California Whitebark, is a shrub or small tree in the buckthorn family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceanothus integerrimus var. californicus include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide antioxidant effects. Ceanothus integerrimus var. californicus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
